problems.title: two sum
valid parentheses
maximum subarray
problems.solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))

max_sum = arr[0]
current = arr[0]

for i in range(1, n):
    current = max(arr[i], current + arr[i])
    max_sum = max(max_sum, current)

print(max_sum)

problems.title: binary search
problems.solution:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
target = int(input())

l, r = 0, n - 1
res = -1

while l <= r:
    mid = (l + r) // 2
    if arr[mid] == target:
        res = mid
        break
    elif arr[mid] < target:
        l = mid + 1
    else:
        r = mid - 1

print(res)

problems.title: merge intervals
longest substring without repeating characters
problems.solution:
s = input().strip()
char_set = set()
l = 0
max_len = 0

for r in range(len(s)):
    while s[r] in char_set:
        char_set.remove(s[l])
        l += 1
    char_set.add(s[r])
    max_len = max(max_len, r - l + 1)

print(max_len)

pos = int(input())

print("false" if pos == -1 else "true")

problems.title: dijkstra shortest path
problems.solution:
import heapq

n, m = map(int, input().split())
graph = [[] for _ in range(n)]

for _ in range(m):
    u, v, w = map(int, input().split())
    graph[u].append((v, w))
    graph[v].append((u, w))

src = int(input())

dist = [float('inf')] * n
dist[src] = 0

pq = [(0, src)]

while pq:
    d, u = heapq.heappop(pq)
    if d > dist[u]:
        continue
    for v, w in graph[u]:
        if dist[v] > d + w:
            dist[v] = d + w
            heapq.heappush(pq, (dist[v], v))

print(*dist)

problems.title: knapsack problem
problems.solution:
n, W = map(int, input().split())
items = [tuple(map(int, input().split())) for _ in range(n)]

dp = [0] * (W + 1)

for w, v in items:
    for j in range(W, w - 1, -1):
        dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j - w] + v)

print(dp[W])
